message:
fuzz: add 4 new cargo-fuzz targets for parser boundaries

config_toml_parser: fuzzes Config::from_toml with arbitrary TOML input
ntm_importer_json: fuzzes parse_ntm_sessions/workflows/config with arbitrary JSON
recorder_event_json: fuzzes parse_recorder_event_json with arbitrary JSON
scan_pipeline_quick: fuzzes quick_scan with arbitrary binary terminal output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
